color_story: Eucalyptus sage (H:158°) as primary neutral ensures cool-morning clarity without blue-coldness; warm clay (H:18°) appears only at project metadata level, maintaining a 140° visual separation. The hue sits safely outside forbidden zones (0°–112°, 352°–360°) and 33° eastward of Apr 17's position, clearing recent palettes. Light backgrounds (#F2F6F4 page, #FAFCFB cards) reflect spring's lengthening daylight; waxing crescent signal reduces shadow opacity to 0.05 and softens borders, creating a moonlit-but-legible morning-to-daylight transition.
